This completed awareness activity was logged only.','','Lead Owner: ' + (d.leadOwnerName || 'unknown'),'Lead Owner Email: ' + (d.leadOwnerEmail || 'unknown'),'Lead Owner ID: ' + (d.leadOwnerId || 'unknown'),'','Inbox: ' + (d.inboxSource || ''),'From: ' + (d.senderName || '') + ' <' + (d.senderEmail || '') + '>','To: ' + (d.toRecipients || ''),'CC: ' + (d.ccRecipients || 'none'),'Subject: ' + (d.subject || ''),'Received: ' + (d.receivedDateTime || ''),'Internet Message ID: ' + (d.internetMessageId || ''),'','Email Body:', bodyText].join('\n'); })() }}

This completed awareness activity was logged only.','','Lead Owner: ' + (d.leadOwnerName || 'unknown'),'Lead Owner Email: ' + (d.leadOwnerEmail || 'unknown'),'Lead Owner ID: ' + (d.leadOwnerId || 'unknown'),'','Inbox: ' + (d.inboxSource || ''),'From: ' + (d.senderName || '') + ' <' + (d.senderEmail || '') + '>','To: ' + (d.toRecipients || ''),'CC: ' + (d.ccRecipients || 'none'),'Subject: ' + (d.subject || ''),'Received: ' + (d.receivedDateTime || ''),'Internet Message ID: ' + (d.internetMessageId || ''),'','Email Body:', bodyText].join('\n'); })() }}
additionalFields.subject: Inbound reply received — lead stage blocked, no automation created

nodes.name: Log Inbound Reply — Lead Stage Blocked, No Automation

parameters.content:
## 1  Example User's Inbox
Microsoft Outlook account (Example User)
Polls every minute — unread only.
Normalizes → Get Message (full body) → Enrich → Merge.

## 2 Example Representative's Inbox
Microsoft Outlook account 2 (Example Representative)
Polls every minute — unread only.
Normalizes → Get Message (full body) → Enrich → Merge.

## 3  Merge + Lead Match + Classify
Searches Salesforce Leads by cleanedSenderEmail.
IsConverted = false, IsDeleted = false
ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 1

→ Only process emails received on/after June 29, 2026
→ Match → Classify → Route
→ Classification happens BEFORE any Engagement Status change
→ Only Real Human Reply may pause Lead / create reply task

## 4  Human Reply Dedupe (after Lead + EST pause)
Runs only on Real Human Reply path after Lead pause and EST pause.
Fetches today's reply tasks (up to 50) and matches internetMessageId in Description.
Always outputs data even when no task exists.

→ Same Message ID: skip task only → Lead + EST already paused
→ New Message ID: create task → verify owner

## 5 Human Reply Actions (classify first)

Real Human Reply:
  → Classify + Route
  → Check Lead Stage
  → Update Lead (Paused - Human Conversation)
  → Verify Lead pause
  → Pause Active EST
  → Dedupe by Message ID
  → Create reply task for Lead Owner
  → Verify task owner

OOO / Bounce / Calendar:
  → Classify + Route
  → Log completed awareness activity only
  → No Engagement Status change
  → No EST pause
  → No human reply task

## 6 OOO / Auto / Bounce / Calendar
Logs completed awareness Task assigned to matched Lead Owner.

No Human Override.
No Engagement Status change.
No EST pause.
No human-response reply task.

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, Name, Status, Email, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Owner.Email, Engagement_Status__c, LastModifiedDate FROM Lead WHERE Email = '" + $json.leadMatchEmail + "' AND IsConverted = false AND IsDeleted = false ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 1" }}

This completed awareness activity was logged only.','','Lead Owner: ' + (d.leadOwnerName || 'unknown'),'Lead Owner Email: ' + (d.leadOwnerEmail || 'unknown'),'Lead Owner ID: ' + (d.leadOwnerId || 'unknown'),'','Inbox: ' + (d.inboxSource || ''),'From: ' + (d.senderName || '') + ' <' + (d.senderEmail || '') + '>','To: ' + (d.toRecipients || ''),'CC: ' + (d.ccRecipients || 'none'),'Subject: ' + (d.subject || ''),'Received: ' + (d.receivedDateTime || ''),'Internet Message ID: ' + (d.internetMessageId || ''),'','Email Body:', bodyText].join('\n'); })() }}

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, Subject, Description, OwnerId, Owner.Name, WhoId, ActivityDate, CreatedDate FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $("Normalize Lead Match Result").item.json.leadId + "' AND Subject = 'Prospect replied \u2014 respond within 24 hours' AND ActivityDate = " + $now.setZone('America/Los_Angeles').toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') + " ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 50" }}
